response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), and testing frameworks like Vitest via personal projects. His leadership in open-source tooling, architecture diversity, and process improvement (CI/CD, TDD) exceeds typical senior expectations, though his lack of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin/Java production use is a minor gap.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and custom test frameworks
Strong advocacy for engineering excellence through open-source contributions, workshops, and TDD/CI/CD practices
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in work history, though Node.js and TypeScript experience is robust
Kotlin/Java experience is limited to embedded/robotics contexts, not enterprise backend services
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit Nest.js or enterprise Kotlin/Java use
